title: Tabbed Project Workspace
concept: A compact enterprise workspace for agency developers that treats each Playground as a project tab and each project surface as a second-level tab, with launch, save, gallery, library, import, and export flows handled in a contextual drawer.
flows: Switch between saved and unsaved Playgrounds using top project tabs
Inspect the active Playground through Site, Files, Blueprint, Database, Logs, and Settings tabs
Start a Playground from vanilla WordPress, WordPress PR, Gutenberg PR or branch, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, zip import, featured Blueprint shortcuts, or the full Blueprint gallery
Save temporary Playgrounds to browser storage or a local directory with visible progress
Manage saved Playgrounds with rename and delete actions
Navigate the embedded WordPress site by path, refresh it, and open Homepage or WP Admin
Export to GitHub, download zip bundles, import zips, and download Blueprint or database artifacts
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
refresh the active embedded WordPress page
edit WordPress, PHP, and language settings
understand destructive reset and saved reload behavior
use File browser with create folder, create file, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
view, copy, download, and run the current Blueprint bundle
inspect database driver, path, and size
inspect Playground, WordPress, and PHP logs with empty states
